name: case_13_mock_partial_write
description: Mock-based injection: simulate partial write failure where event text is truncated on SQL backend

parts.text: What is the detailed procedure for deploying the new microservice architecture to production?
The deployment procedure involves 5 steps: 1) Build Docker image, 2) Push to registry, 3) Update Kubernetes manifests, 4) Apply rolling update, 5) Verify health checks.
